name: Combined Support Agent (Custom OVMS + AI Agent)

parameters.text:
Customer message: {{ $('Webhook: POST /support-v2').item.json.body.message }}

Sentiment analysis result: {{ $json.predictions[0].label }} (confidence: {{ $json.predictions[0].confidence }})

You MUST use the tools provided. Do NOT write responses yourself. Follow these steps exactly:

STEP 1: Call lookup_knowledge_base with keywords from the customer message.
STEP 2: Call create_ticket with customer_message, priority (HIGH if NEGATIVE, LOW if POSITIVE, MEDIUM otherwise), and sentiment.
STEP 3: After BOTH tools have been called, write a brief summary.

options.systemMessage: You are a customer support agent. You MUST call tools to do your work. NEVER write ticket details or knowledge base results yourself. You MUST call lookup_knowledge_base first, then call create_ticket. Do NOT skip any tool calls. Do NOT generate fake ticket IDs. Only give a final text response AFTER you have called both tools.

parameters.name: lookup_knowledge_base
parameters.description: Search the support knowledge base for articles matching the customer issue. Input: search keywords.

parameters.name: create_ticket
parameters.description: Create a support ticket. Required inputs: customer_message (the original message), priority (HIGH, MEDIUM, or LOW), sentiment (POSITIVE, NEGATIVE, or NEUTRAL). Returns ticket ID and details.

parameters.name: analyze_sentiment
parameters.description: Analyze the sentiment of a text message using DistilBERT on OpenVINO Model Server. Input: the text to analyze. Returns sentiment label (POSITIVE/NEGATIVE) and confidence score.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, message: $('Webhook: POST /support-v2').item.json.body.message, sentiment: $('OpenVINO Model Server1').item.json.predictions[0], agent_response: $json.output } }}
